steps.name: typography
steps.summary: Text 8 variant (Display/H1/H2/H3/Body/Small/Tiny/MonoLabel) — 단일 base + variant 매핑. tailwind config fontFamily 에 weight 별 alias 추가 (manrope-bold/extrabold/semibold). 5 color token + accessibilityRole + numberOfLines passthrough + MonoLabel uppercase. 59 신규 테스트 (총 510). src/components 100/100/100/100.
